title: [#81] Build Person Detail page with view and edit functionality

risks: Shell/glob expansion of $ in filenames may cause issues in some CI environments — paths containing $id must be single-quoted or escaped
Route.useParams() is mocked in tests via vi.mock('@tanstack/react-router') — tests depend on this pattern remaining stable
getEmployeeQueryKey structure is tied to the invalidation assertions in AC6 tests — changing the key format would break tests
NOT_FOUND detection relies on oRPC error having a .code property — if that format changes the detection logic needs updating
test-utils/render.tsx does not include RouterProvider; relies on useParams being fully mocked in tests

conversation_log.summary: Began implementation of employee detail page route at /employee/$id with TanStack Query, MUI, and i18n.

Implemented /employee/$id route component with view/edit form, success/error alerts, loading/not-found states, and full cache invalidation. Created co-located test file covering AC1-AC9 and AC12. Created shared test-utils/render.tsx utility. Added employee.detail i18n keys to common.json. PR #87 opened.
